description: AI Bot configuration for Sharp-Blaze. Defines difficulty levels and simplex optimization parameters.

EASY.description: Easy difficulty: Bot plays cautiously with basic heuristics

MEDIUM.description: Medium difficulty: Bot balances aggression and resource gathering

HARD.description: Hard difficulty: Bot plays aggressively with optimized simplex decisions

simplex_constraints.max_units_per_player_description: Maximum number of units any player can have in play simultaneously. Prevents exponential unit spam.
simplex_constraints.max_attackers_per_decision_description: Maximum Attacker units to purchase in a single decision cycle
simplex_constraints.max_collectors_per_decision_description: Maximum Collector units to purchase in a single decision cycle
simplex_constraints.pathfinding_max_iterations_description: Maximum A* iterations when computing unit movement paths. Prevents infinite loops.
